card.name: The Good Hunter
card.text: Prevent all damage that would be dealt to Hunters you control while fighting. Hunt for Paleblood — At the beginning of your end step, if a player gained life and a player lost life this turn, target creature you control fights target creature you don't control.

card.name: Visceral Attack
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature you don't control. Hunt for Paleblood — At the beginning of your end step, if a player gained life and a player lost life this turn, you may return this card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Consult the Great Ones
card.text: Reveal the top six cards of your library. An opponent puts one on the bottom of your library. Then you may put an artifact or enchantment card revealed this way onto the battlefield. Then they put a card on the bottom of your library. Then you put one into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order. Flashback {7}{U}{R} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Gentle Quiet
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3} plus an additional {X}. You gain X life. Where X is the number of artifacts you control.

card.name: The Hunter's Armory
card.text: Whenever this or another artifact you control enters, you may mill two cards. Once during each of your turns, you may cast an artifact spell from your graveyard by sacrificing an artifact in addition to paying its other costs. Whenever you cast an artifact spell this way, it enters with a finality counter on it.

card.name: The Tragedy of Ludwig
card.text: Create X 1/1 white Human creature tokens. For each token created this way, you may attach an equipment you control to it.

card.name: Crimes of the Church
card.text: If you would create one or more tokens, you may create that many 3/3 green Beast creature tokens instead.

card.name: The Child Kin
card.text: Protection from Great Ones and Kin (This creature can't be blocked, targeted or dealt damage by Great Ones and Kin.) {T}: Add two mana of any one color. Spend this mana only to cast enchantment spells or activate the abilities of enchantments.

card.name: Mensis Cage
Behold! A Paleblood Sky
card.text: Destroy all non-Great One creatures.

card.name: Insight BUB
card.text:
When you increase your insight, Surveil X and lose X life, where X is your current insight, then draw a card.
Track your current insight here.

card.name: Dark Well
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {3}, Discard this card: Increase your insight. (Gain an insight. Surveil X and lose X life, where X is your current insight, then draw a card.)

card.name: Blood Stone Shard
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand. {1}, {T}, Discard a card, sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.

card.name: Blood Rock
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. This mana can't be spent to cast spells from your hand. {2}, {T}, Discard a card, sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards.

card.name: Altar of Surgery
card.text: Sacrifice another artifact or creature: Target player mills X cards where X is one plus that permanent's mana value.

card.name: Chalice Ritual Site
card.text: {1}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Venture into the Chalice Dungeon. (Enter the first room or advance to the next room.)

card.name: The Cursed Coast
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. {3}{U}{U}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a blue 4/4 Fish Kin enchantment creature with "Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card." It's still a land.

card.name: Snake Infested Gravesite
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. {1}{B}{B}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a black 2/2 Pthumerian creature with deathtouch and "Whenever this creature dies, put a +1/+1 counter on each other creature you control." It's still a land.

card.name: Great Bridge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. {4}{G}{G}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a 6/6 green Beast creature with trample and "Whenever a creature dealt damage by this creature dies this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature."

card.name: Grand Cathedral
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {W}. {2}{W}{W}: Until end of turn, this land becomes a white 3/3 Cleric creature with lifelink and "Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature." It's still a land.

card.name: Hypogean Gaol
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}. {4}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Aura or Equipment card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.
